title: PPL Benefits From Acquisitions, Cost-Saving Initiatives
text: PPL is expected to further benefit from its ongoing capital investments, completed acquisitions, and savings in operation and maintenance costs.

title: PPL Corporation's (PPL) Q1 Earnings & Sales Surpass Estimates
text: PPL Corporation's (PPL) first-quarter earnings are better than expected. Acquired Rhodes Island assets continue to contribute to the company's earnings.

title: PPL Corp.: Strategic Repositioning Fostering Growth
text: PPL's previous quarterly earnings were strong in regards to revenues and down on EPS due to restructuring. Adjusting for dividends, the company has maintained performance with the S&P 500.

title: PPL Corporation (PPL) to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: PPL Corporation's (PPL) first-quarter earnings are likely to have benefited from higher residential group demands and a decline in O&M expenses.
